I have bad news for Mulembe people. The current DVC of Kibabi Mr. Maiyo Kibet will be confirmed today as the VC Kibabi university. The reason why am saying it's sad do you remember how Mandago chased professor Ayiro? Saying Moi university belongs to Kalenjins? What did the kalenjin do at the top? Currently Moi university is collapsing. The same thing will happen to Kibabi university. The installation of Maiyo is to enable a government puppet to steal and loot Mr Wetangula don't we have a qualified luhyas to head Kibabi? Mr Musalia can a luhya be made a VC of Moi university or even Koitalel University? The installation of Mr. Maiyo MUST be rejected, Hon. Majimbo Kalasinga and Hon Jack Wanami Wamboka amkeni chini, they have sold our prestigious companies they have now reached at our university.

Watu wa murima are "tribalist and selfish," yet they voted for this government? We were kicked out from the government because it was Kasongo's long held vision to deal with us. And we naively thought he was our friend, kumbe ni mbwa mwitu. So excuse us with the false allegations. It's Kasongo, not Riggy G, that has excluded us. And we have accepted. If that's what they call "radicalization" then so be it. Kasongo awachane na sisi tujipange. We don't tambua him.

@Disembe You forgot to mention that part where almost 2000 Kenyans were brutally murdered in ethnic clashes some led by the Kalenjin Warriors during the 1992 polls. So if 2027 will be like 1992, then you are envisioning and/or plotting terrible things for this nation. Wrrntrrm ✊🏾🇰🇪
